r3ct_daily.advancement.first_quest.title: Breaking the Ice
r3ct_daily.advancement.first_quest.desc: Complete and claim the reward for your first daily quest.
r3ct_daily.advancement.hamster.title: Hoarder
r3ct_daily.advancement.hamster.desc: Accumulate maximum active Quest Streak Shields.
r3ct_daily.advancement.hard_work.title: Hard Work Pays Off
r3ct_daily.advancement.hard_work.desc: Complete and claim a 'Hard' difficulty quest.
r3ct_daily.advancement.hundred_quests.de: Complete a total of 100 daily quests.
r3ct_daily.advancement.lucky_drop.title: Lucky Strike
r3ct_daily.advancement.lucky_drop.desc: Get diamonds from the Daily Reward Chest (for 3 quests).
r3ct_daily.advancement.perfect_day.title: Perfectionist
r3ct_daily.advancement.perfect_day.desc: Complete all 5 daily quests in a single day.
r3ct_daily.advancement.points_hunter.des: Claim the maximum reward from the total points bar (200 pts).
r3ct_daily.advancement.root.title: R3CT Daily Quests
r3ct_daily.advancement.root.desc: Begin your adventure with daily challenges.
r3ct_daily.advancement.time_lord.title: Time Lord
r3ct_daily.advancement.time_lord.desc: Save your streak from resetting by using a Streak Shield.
r3ct_daily.advancement.week_streak.title: A Solid Week
r3ct_daily.advancement.week_streak.desc: Maintain a quest streak for 7 days and activate the bonus XP multiplier.
r3ct_daily.advancement.always_on_time.de: Activate the bonus loot by logging in for 7 consecutive days.
r3ct_daily.advancement.cycle_end.title: End of the Cycle
r3ct_daily.advancement.cycle_end.desc: Reach the end of the bar and claim the main 21-day bonus.
r3ct_daily.advancement.first_reward.desc: Claim your first daily login reward.
r3ct_daily.advancement.login_veteran.des: Claim the daily reward a total of 50 times.
r3ct_daily.advancement.rich_week.title: Week of Wealth
r3ct_daily.advancement.rich_week.desc: Claim the chest reward for your 7th day of logging in.
r3ct_daily.advancement.rewards_root.desc: Log in regularly to claim rewards.
r3ct_daily.advancement.safe_player.title: Better Safe Than Sorry
r3ct_daily.advancement.safe_player.desc: Save your reward streak from resetting by using a Reward Streak Shield.
Accumulate maximum active Reward Streak Shields.
r3ct_daily.advancement.week_bonus.title: Payday
r3ct_daily.advancement.week_bonus.desc: Claim the bonus for 7 days of continuous login.
